# Feature: Pipeline Reliability and Bug-Fix Workflow Hardening

> Feature ID: FEAT-005
> Status: 🔵 active
> Created: 2026-04-20T00:00:00Z

## Description

Eliminate dead ends, silent failures, and data-loss gaps across the fix-bug workflow, sprint planning, calibration, and telemetry — ensuring every phase gate is enforced, every store write is verified, and every record carries real timestamps and cost data.

## Requirements

- /forge:calibrate initializes a missing baseline instead of requiring /forge:init
- fix-bug Finalize is enforced by a phase gate (collate must succeed before sprint can close)
- collate.cjs accepts bug IDs as first-class arguments without requiring --purge-events
- Bug records carry real ISO datetimes (not T00:00:00Z); store-cli auto-populates when agent supplies date-only
- Bug cost data is captured programmatically (store-cli subcommand or collate pre-purge aggregation) instead of relying on /cost
- Sprint planning agents verify every store write succeeded and retry on schema violations
- Model discovery records the actual model in use, not a hardcoded fallback
